headings.style: High-contrast serif, tracking-tight, elegant. Use font-light or font-black, avoid generic bold.

body.usage: Paragraphs, Buttons, UI Elements, Admin Dashboard
body.style: Clean, geometric sans-serif for high legibility and contemporary feel.

store_front: Crystal Glassmorphism for sticky navigation (backdrop-blur-2xl bg-white/70, border-b border-black/5)
Subtle parallax and smooth scrolling using framer-motion
Hover states: image zoom, subtle overlay
admin_dashboard: Clear visual hierarchy with monochrome base + brand accent

store_front.hero: Full screen cinematic hero or split screen. Playfair Display H1 text-6xl+ overlaid on imagery with max bg-black/30 or bg-white/20.
store_front.product_grid: Asymmetric bento grid. Mix col-span-4 and col-span-8 to create editorial tension.
store_front.product_page: Immersive split layout. Left side: sticky product images with scroll snap. Right side: scrolling product details, color swatches (jaune, bleu, vert, rose, fuchsia, turquoise, blanc cristal, noir, violet).
store_front.navigation: Minimalist header, logo centered or left, language selector (flags), cart drawer toggle. Megamenu for categories.

admin_dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (dark mode) + Topbar (light mode) + Main Content Area.
admin_dashboard.widgets: High density grid (grid-cols-4), tight gaps (gap-4). Use Shadcn tables, charts, cards.

component_guidelines.store_front: Use raw HTML + Tailwind + Framer Motion. AVOID Shadcn Card/Section components for layout to maintain creative freedom. Use Shadcn for Form, Select, Dialog (Drawer).
component_guidelines.admin_dashboard: Use Shadcn components extensively (Tables, Cards, Dialogs, Select, Tabs, Recharts).
component_guidelines.buttons: Pill-shaped or sharp contemporary buttons. For primary CTA: bg-[#0A0A0A] text-[#FDFBF7] hover:bg-[#0A0A0A]/80.
component_guidelines.icons: Use lucide-react for both store and admin.

motion.store_front: Use framer-motion. Staggered fade-up for text, scale transitions for images.
motion.admin_dashboard: Minimalist micro-interactions for feedback. No heavy animations.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA/WCAG AA compliance. Dark text on ivory, white text on dark overlays.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., 'add-to-cart-btn', 'language-selector', 'admin-sidebar-link').

brand_models.description: Chic woman barefoot in white suit on black background (Brand Story / Histoire de la maison)
Stylish woman in black dress on white (Editorial/Journal)
Woman in black turtleneck and gold belt (Hero alternate / Values)

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You are using .js files not .tsx. Adjust imports and component syntax accordingly.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. Do not add text-align: center to body or main wrapper.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use generous spacing. If typical design uses p-4, use p-8 or p-12.
Do not use transparent background in headers. Use backdrop-blur with bg-white/70 or solid color.
Never use AI assistant emoji characters for icons.
Prioritize using pre-existing Shadcn components from src/components/ui for complex interactions.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for artistic layouts, Shadcn for logic-heavy components.
